THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT DUBBS, SARAH PER COST BILL. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED & DECREED THAT THE MON THLY RENT OF THE PREMISES IS DETERM. TO BE $500 A MONTH, & THAT THE ABSENCE OF SUFFICIENT HEAT DEEMS THE PREMISES TO BE 15% UNINHABITABLE. A 15% REDUCT. OF RT COMMENCING 6/1/96 SHALL CONT. TO REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL OPERABLE HEAT IS PROV.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT DUBBS, SARAH JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES TO DEFTS, PURS TO CC 1942.5(RETALIATION). IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE MONTHLY RENT IS $500 A MONTH, & THAT DEFTS PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $425 RENT FOR JULY 1996. SAID 15% REDUCT. OF RENT COMM. 7/1/96 SHALL CONT. TO REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL SUFF. HEAT IS PROV.
